title: Service + DTO — Task API
description:
### Your Task

Build a Task/Todo CRUD API with Service + DTO pattern.

### Requirements

- `Task` entity: `id` (Long), `title` (String), `description` (String), `status` (String), `priority` (String), `dueDate` (String)
- `TaskRequestDTO`: `title`, `description`, `status`, `priority`, `dueDate`
- `TaskResponseDTO`: `id`, `title`, `description`, `status`, `priority`, `dueDate`
- `TaskRepository`, `TaskService`, `TaskController` at `/api/tasks`

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/tasks` → List of TaskResponseDTO (200)
- `GET /api/tasks/{id}` → TaskResponseDTO (200 or 404)
- `POST /api/tasks` → Accept TaskRequestDTO, return TaskResponseDTO (201)
- `PUT /api/tasks/{id}` → Accept TaskRequestDTO, return TaskResponseDTO (200 or 404)
- `DELETE /api/tasks/{id}` → 204 or 404
hints: Status and priority are just Strings — no enums needed
dueDate is also a String for simplicity
Same Service + DTO pattern as challenge 10
